name: Avocado Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F and prepare muffin pans.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg, then blend in the avocado, milk, and nuts.
4. Mix in the self-rising flour until just combined.
5. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups and sprinkle each with toasted slivered almonds.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Add a dash of grated lemon rind if desired. Toast almonds quickly in the microwave or a dry frying pan, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
